roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT & RESTITUTION/X: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE PTD PROGRESS REPORT & CLASSES ARE COMPLETED/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/PROGPTD:06-30-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL:TS PRELIMINARY HEARING/FAVRPT/CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS ARE SUSPENDED/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INTO AN INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATED INFORMAL DIVERSION IS DEFENDANT WILL NOT ENTER PLEA FOR ONE YEAR, MUST COMPLETE 6MORE CLASSES FOR THINKING FOR A CHANGE, ENGAGE MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING IFAPPROVED THRU PTD, ABIDE BY PREVIOUSLY FILED STAY AWAY ORDER AND CONTINUEAPPROPRIATE SUPERVISION THRU DOCTOR FOR PHARMACEUTICAL PURPOSES/X:IF DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL IN COMPLETING THESE TERMS AND DOES NOT PICK UP ANY NEW ARREST LEADING TO NEW CHARGES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/PROGPTD:12-13-21/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL: DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/STWPX/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S HOME DETENTION ISMODIFIED AS FOLLOWS, THE DEFENDANT MAY LEAVE HIS HOME FOR MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS AND TO SEE HIS ATTORNEY,  HE MUST NOTIFIED THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT24 HOURS PRIOR/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MOTION TO DETAIN FILED BY THE PEOPLE/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED//TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/CAUSE1/NTW60/LDPX:06-04-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND ISORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WS/WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY HAVE TOOLS FOR WORK, DURING HIS WORK HOURS ONLY//CTORD:REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE UNLESS ATWORK/DEF:MUST ATTEND ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASS PER WEEK/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA5:RUDY HERRERA AND KARLA C/SAORD2/SAORD4:50 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE ON 04-19-21/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 05-10-21/TE:90 MINUTES/DOP/4011,5/X:FOR MEDICATION/
/CAL:TS PRELIM HEARING OR DISPO/X:DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT/CONT/DOP
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/FAVRPT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO TERMINATE GPS MONITORING IS GRANTED/EMTERM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/FAVRPT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO TERMINATE ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONT/DOP/
